graded_findings.rationale: The generated repository index is part of the shared repo context and should reflect newly added source files. Missing cli/net_check.py leaves documented repository structure stale for future codebase navigation.

The gather finding identifies new cli.net_check.ping_worker behavior with no PR test coverage for success, failure, or subprocess command arguments. For infrastructure-facing CLI behavior, that is a substantive adherence gap and should block merge until covered.
